name: claude-console
description: Claude Code terminal HUD: the full session dashboard rendered inside every Claude Code tab — agents, workflows, shells, context and rate-limit gauges — plus the claude-console CLI view and a one-command installer. Zero runtime dependencies; data comes from Claude Code's statusline stdin JSON, ~/.claude runtime files, the process table, and git — never from terminal scraping.
author: Argishti Ovsepyan
